Guess who accidentally deleted the bot while rewriting it?

Anyway...

As I wrote on my profile, I'm rewriting my bots so that they don't break the rules of the new TOS.

So every scenario of my "𝙡𝙚𝙩 𝙢𝙚 𝙗𝙚 𝙮𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙛𝙖𝙫𝙤𝙧𝙞𝙩𝙚" 'series' now take place in alternative universe where Geto and Nanami didn't leave, Yu didn't die and they're all now teachers at Jujutsu Tech (they're around 20 years old).

Sorry for this little mess and I hope you understand

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

Have fun
